en: Does your company have 20 or more employees in Brazil?
This information must match your Avetta Brazil Annual Update form
Please enter the number of employees at your company:
Based on your employee count and assigned risk grade, does your company have an established CIPA with the required number of members?

The uploaded document must be the most recent version of your company’s CIPA Installation and Inauguration Minutes (Ata de Instalação e Posse da CIPA). This document should reflect the latest CIPA election and formation in compliance with NR-5. Even if no changes have occurred, you are required to submit the most recent record available. Failure to provide an updated document may result in non-compliance.
Please upload a Copy of the installation and inauguration minutes.
